ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification
Polenta or maize/corn semolina, cooked, no added salt

ingredients_text: 31% Bio rote Paprika, 30% Bio Tomatenmark, Bio Sonnenblumenöl, Bio Zwiebeln, 4% Bio Hanfsaat, Bio Sonnenblumenkerne, Bio Reismehl, Bio Sesam, Bio Kartoffelpulver, Meersalz, Bio Apfelsaftkonzentrat, Bio Zitronensaftkonzentrat, Bio Maisgrieß, Bio Paprika, Bio Pfeffer weiß.
